urdu transliteration text:
JUKTE HAI JAHA SHAH BHI TERA WO ASTAAN
ABBAS  TERE DAR SA DUNIYA MAI DAR KAHA
english translation text: Where even kings bow their heads, such is your shrine

urdu transliteration text: ABBAS TERE DAR SA DUNIYA MAI DAR KAHA
english translation text: O Abbas, where is a door such as yours in the entire world?

urdu transliteration text: TU QAMARE BANI HASHIM ZAHRA KI TU DUA HAI
english translation text: You are the moon of Bani Hashim, the dua of Bibi Zahra (a.s)

urdu transliteration text: SAYA TERE ALAM KA DO JAG PE BA KHUDA HAI
english translation text: By God, your flag provides shade to the entire universe

urdu transliteration text:
TERE ALAM KO CHUMNE JUKTA HAI ASMAAN
Even the sky bows down to kiss your flag
SHERE KHUDA HAI BABA SHERE KARBALA TU
english translation text: Your father is the lion of God, and you are the lion of Karbala

urdu transliteration text: TERE DAR PE JO BHI AAYE MUSHKIL KARE KUSHA TU
english translation text: Whoever comes to your door, you fulfill their wishes

urdu transliteration text: TERE DIYE JALATA HAI IS LIYE JAHAN
english translation text: That’s the reason why the world lights candles (in your remembrance)

urdu transliteration text: TU SHAHENSHAH HAI AQA DO JAG ME TERI SHAHI
english translation text: You are the king and your kingdom spreads across the universe

urdu transliteration text: PANJTAN HAI TUJ PE NAZAA AISI WAFAA NIBHAI
english translation text: The Panjetan are proud of you, such was your loyalty

urdu transliteration text: SHAHID TERE ALAM PAR PANJTAN KA YE NISHAN
english translation text: Probably this is why there is symbol of Panjetan on your flag

urdu transliteration text: JO BHI KHUDA SE MAANGA TERE ALAM SE PAAYA
english translation text: Whatever we asked god, we received it through (the intercession) of your flag

urdu transliteration text: TERE ALAM KA SAYA HAI KIBRIYA KA SAYA
english translation text: The shade of your flag is like the authority of the almighty

urdu transliteration text: KYU NA TERE ALAM PE AAKAR KAHE JAHAA'N
english translation text: Why should the world not come to say this on your flag…?
